sdlc milestone list && echo "---FEATURES---" && sdlc feature list

thinking.thinking: Now let me read the artifacts to understand the full idea:

input.command: sdlc ponder artifact read knowledge-librarian knowledge-spec.md && echo "===PLAN===" && sdlc ponder artifact read knowledge-librarian plan.md && echo "===DECISIONS===" && sdlc ponder artifact read knowledge-librarian decisions-final.md

input.description: Read ponder artifacts directly from filesystem

input.command: sdlc ponder session read knowledge-librarian 3 && echo "===SESSION2===" && sdlc ponder session read knowledge-librarian 2

thinking.thinking:
Now I have a comprehensive understanding of what this ponder contains. Let me analyze the existing milestones and features to see what's already been created:

Looking at the feature list, I can see these already exist:
- `knowledge-core-data` — released (Rust knowledge.rs module — KnowledgeEntry, Catalog, CRUD, storage)
- `knowledge-cli-ingest` — merge (sdlc knowledge CLI commands and server CRUD routes)
- `knowledge-librarian-init` — draft (sdlc knowledge librarian init — project scan, catalog gen, agent file, hooks)
- `knowledge-query-mode` — draft (sdlc knowledge ask — librarian query mode via spawn_agent_run)


- `knowledge-research-mode` — draft (sdlc knowledge research — agent-driven multi-source research with sessions)
- `knowledge-librarian-maintain` — draft (sdlc knowledge librarian run — maintenance pass + harvest hooks wired)
- `knowledge-page-ui` — draft (KnowledgePage — three-pane catalog browser in the sdlc UI)
- `knowledge-advisory-integration` — draft (Advisory runs draw from knowledge base — inject relevant entries as context)
- `knowledge-slash-command` — draft (sdlc-knowledge slash command in init.rs — all four AI CLI platforms)

And these milestones already exist:
- `v10-knowledge-capture` — active (Knowledge base: capture and organize) with 3 features
- `v11-knowledge-librarian` — active (Knowledge base: the active librarian) with 3 features
- `v12-knowledge-ui` — active (Knowledge base: UI and integrations) with 3 features

It looks like the milestones and features from this ponder have already been created, possibly before the commit flow ran or as part of a previous execution. I need to verify whether these milestones have the correct features assigned to them. Looking at the plan.md in the ponder, Phase 1 should include knowledge-core-data and knowledge-cli-ingest features, so I should check if those are properly mapped to v10.

Comparing the plan against the current state, all three milestones appear to have the right features assigned: v10 has the three Phase 1 features, v11 has the three Phase 2 features, and v12 has the three Phase 3 features as expected.

Now I need to verify whether the ponder already has these committed-to milestones linked, then document what's been completed.

text: Now I have full context. The milestones and features already exist — v10, v11, v12 were created from this ponder. Let me check their feature assignments and link the ponder to the milestones.

input.command: sdlc milestone info v10-knowledge-capture && echo "---v11---" && sdlc milestone info v11-knowledge-librarian && echo "---v12---" && sdlc milestone info v12-knowledge-ui
input.description: Check milestone details and feature assignments
Check if committed-to is already set in ponder manifest

thinking.thinking:
The ponder is already committed and the milestones/features are already created. The `committed_to` field is not set in the manifest yet. I need to:

1. Link committed-to milestones (Step 4)
2. Verify everything looks correct
3. Report

Let me link the ponder to all three milestones.

text: All three milestones and their 9 features exist and are correctly assigned. The ponder's `committed_to` field just needs to be set. Let me link them:

input.command: sdlc ponder update knowledge-librarian --committed-to v10-knowledge-capture --committed-to v11-knowledge-librarian --committed-to v12-knowledge-ui
input.description: Link ponder to its three milestones

text:
Done. Here's the summary:

## Commit Complete: `knowledge-librarian`

**Three milestones crystallized from this ponder — all already active with features assigned:**

| Milestone | Vision | Features |
|---|---|---|
| `v10-knowledge-capture` | Capture + browse knowledge from any source; librarian init seeds from existing workspaces | `knowledge-core-data`, `knowledge-cli-ingest`, `knowledge-librarian-init` |
| `v11-knowledge-librarian` | Autonomous harvesting, natural-language query with citations, scheduled maintenance | `knowledge-query-mode`, `knowledge-research-mode`, `knowledge-librarian-maintain` |
| `v12-knowledge-ui` | Three-pane catalog UI, advisory context injection, `/sdlc-knowledge` slash command across all CLIs | `knowledge-page-ui`, `knowledge-advisory-integration`, `knowledge-slash-command` |

**Key design decisions captured in the ponder:**
- Librarian init runs automatically from `sdlc init` (no opt-in), gracefully handles empty projects
- Advisory integration uses two-pass tag match + TF-IDF keyword overlap (no external embeddings in v1)
- No cron — orchestrator-tick calls `POST /api/knowledge/maintain` on a scheduled basis

**Next:** `/sdlc-run knowledge-librarian-init` — the oldest draft feature in v11 is `knowledge-librarian-init`, which is the foundation for the active librarian.

## Commit Complete: `knowledge-librarian`

| Milestone | Vision | Features |

**Key design decisions captured in the ponder:**
